idea-plugin.name: Dora MCP Server
idea-plugin.description:
MCP (Model Context Protocol) server for AI-powered code navigation.

Features

  • find_symbol - Find symbols by name pattern across the codebase
  • find_references - Find all references to a symbol
  • get_symbols_overview - Get top-level symbols in a file

API Endpoints

  • GET/POST /api/dora/list_tools - List available tools
  • GET/POST /api/dora/{tool_name} - Execute a tool

Based on JetBrains MCP Server Plugin (Apache 2.0 License).
